task: v148 preference undo hints first stage

module_location: src/jarvis_lite/preferences.py formats confirmation output, confirmation history, ordinary LLM context and local answer notes.
src/jarvis_lite/agent.py exposes /preference-apply-confirm, /preference-apply-history, /preference-apply-undo and appends local answer notes.
tests/test_preferences.py covers confirmation output, history, undo and active local answer note invalidation.
tests/test_agent.py covers Agent command output and local knowledge/memory answer formatting.
current_behavior: 0.142.0 local answer notes include prefapp ID, boundary, confirmation input and confirmed preferences.
Confirmation output includes prefapp ID and one-shot scope, but does not show an exact undo command for that confirmation.
Local answer notes show the active prefapp ID but do not show the exact /preference-apply-undo prefapp-... command.
History has a generic undo hint: /preference-apply-undo 编号或ID.
similar_patterns: describe_preference_application_history() already explains the generic undo command and undo boundary.
undo_preference_application() supports both 1-based index and exact prefapp ID.
Local answer note already avoids LLM provider instructions and is only user-visible on deterministic local answers.
Version updates use pyproject.toml, src/jarvis_lite/__init__.py and tests/test_project_metadata.py.
observation_report: The smallest useful next step is to make the active confirmation directly reversible from visible outputs.
Adding undo hints to LLM fallback context would leak management command text into provider context, so this phase should avoid describe_preference_reply_context().
Using the confirmation ID rather than list index keeps the hint stable even if history ordering changes later.
A helper for formatting the undo command avoids duplicating command text.

key_questions.question: Where should the exact undo hint appear?
key_questions.answer: In describe_confirmed_preference_application() after confirmation succeeds, and in describe_preference_local_answer_note() while a confirmation is active.

key_questions.question: Where should it not appear?
key_questions.answer: Do not add the slash command hint to describe_preference_reply_context(), because that context is sent to the LLM provider during fallback.

key_questions.question: Should this add a new command or setting?
key_questions.answer: No. /preference-apply-undo already accepts the prefapp ID; this phase only surfaces that existing command in visible audit text.

acceptance: Successful /preference-apply-confirm output includes /preference-apply-undo prefapp-... using the same confirmation ID.
Local knowledge answer notes include /preference-apply-undo prefapp-... while the confirmation is active.
Long-term memory fallback notes include the same undo hint while the confirmation is active.
The LLM fallback context and provider instructions still do not expose /preference-apply-undo as an available command.
Version is bumped to 0.143.0 and docs/verification are updated.
